# PERF-206 negative: sqlx.Unsafe is used with a static query name
lang: go
file: PERF-206-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type Order struct {
	ID uint
}

func Load(db *gorm.DB, id uint) error {
	db.Unsafe().Where("orders.idx = ?", id).First(&Order{})
	return nil
}
